description: Refactor the legacy `BeamSetup` class in the `RadiationTherapy` project (~/eclipse-workspace/RadiationTherapy) from a standard POJO to a Java 17 Record. Convert `src/main/java/com/medsys/rt/model/BeamSetup.java` to a public record while preserving constructor validation logic for gantry angles (0-360). Update `src/main/java/com/medsys/rt/service/TreatmentPlan.java` to use record-style accessors and ensure the project compiles and passes all existing JUnit tests in `BeamSetupTest.java`.
